plugin.name: Aardwolf_Combat_Log
plugin.author: Dunnaakr
plugin.purpose: Captures combat and kill aftermath into a permanent miniwindow.
plugin.description:
Permanent combat log window for Aardwolf.
Behavior: - Removes matched combat lines from the main output - Sends combat lines to a dedicated miniwindow - Captures damage, kill lines, exp, gold, loot, skillups, and quest/campaign/global quest kill notices
Commands: combatlog : Show help combatlog show : Show the combat log window combatlog hide : Hide the combat log window combatlog clear : Clear the combat log window combatlog help : Show help
Shortcut: clog <show|hide|clear|help>

trigger.name: combat_hidden_drop
trigger.match: ^You are no longer hidden\.$

trigger.name: combat_fade_in
trigger.match: ^You fade into existence\.$

trigger.name: combat_skillup
trigger.match: ^You have become better at .+! \(\d+%\)$

trigger.name: combat_loot_item
trigger.match: ^You get (?![\d,]+ gold coins)(.+) from the .*corpse of .+\.$

trigger.name: combat_exp
trigger.match: ^You(?: (?:don't))? receive [\d\+]+(?: 'rare kill')?(?: bonus)? experience (?:points?|bonus)(?: courtesy of .*| to celebrate .*| to rejoice in the death of another million mobs| in honor of .*| from your daily blessing)?[\.\!](?: \:\))?$

trigger.name: combat_daily_blessing_exp_remaining
trigger.match: ^You have \d+ daily blessing bonus experience kills remaining\.$

trigger.name: combat_daily_blessing_gold_remaining
trigger.match: ^You have \d+ daily blessing bonus gold kills? remaining\.$

trigger.name: combat_gold
trigger.match: ^You get [\d,]+ gold coins from .+\.$

trigger.name: combat_gold_daily
trigger.match: ^Your daily blessing added .* gold to the corpse\.$

trigger.name: combat_sacrifice
trigger.match: ^.* gives you \d+ gold coins? for .+\.$

trigger.name: combat_split
trigger.match: ^(?:You share .* gold coins with .* other .*\. Your share is .* gold\.|.* shares .* gold coins with .*\. Your share is .* gold\.)$

trigger.name: combat_crumble
trigger.match: ^Your .* crumbles to dust, but not before giving you .* gold coins?\.$

trigger.name: combat_quest_almost_done
trigger.match: ^QUEST: You have almost completed your QUEST!$

trigger.name: combat_quest_return
trigger.match: ^Return to the questmaster before your time runs out\.$

trigger.name: combat_campaign_kill
trigger.match: ^Congratulations, that was one of your CAMPAIGN mobs!$

trigger.name: combat_gq_kill
trigger.match: ^Congratulations, that was one of the GLOBAL QUEST mobs!$

trigger.name: combat_gq_remaining
trigger.match: ^You can be rewarded for .* more global quest kills? this level\.$

trigger.name: combat_gq_qp
trigger.match: ^3 quest points awarded\.$

trigger.name: combat_campaign_complete
trigger.match: ^CONGRATULATIONS! You have completed your campaign\.$

trigger.name: combat_gq_complete
trigger.match: ^You have finished this global quest\.$

trigger.name: death_mob_mind
trigger.match: ^(?P<mob>[\w ',]+) falls dead as \w+ mind is destroyed.*[^']$

trigger.name: death_mob_drain
trigger.match: ^(?P<mob>[\w ',]+) howls as \w+ last spark of life is drained.*[^']$

trigger.name: death_mob_pale
trigger.match: ^(?P<mob>[\w ',]+) turns deadly pale and collapses.*[^']$

trigger.name: death_mob_acid
trigger.match: ^(?P<mob>[\w ',]+) screams in agony as the acid consumes .*[^']$

trigger.name: death_mob_holy
trigger.match: ^(?P<mob>[\w ',]+) is damned forever by the holy power.*[^']$

trigger.name: death_mob_fire
trigger.match: ^(?P<mob>[\w ',]+) screams as the flames engulf .*[^']$

trigger.name: death_mob_water
trigger.match: ^(?P<mob>[\w ',]+) is battered to death by the force of the water.*[^']$

trigger.name: death_mob_earth
trigger.match: ^(?P<mob>[\w ',]+) crumbles as \w+ is battered to death.*[^']$

trigger.name: death_mob_lightning
trigger.match: ^(?P<mob>[\w ',]+) smoulders as the lightning destroys .*[^']$

trigger.name: death_mob_god
trigger.match: ^The voice of god has cleansed (?P<mob>.+) eternally.*DEAD.*[^']$

trigger.name: death_mob_mindforce
trigger.match: ^The mind force crushes (?P<mob>.+) into a bloody pulp.*DEAD.*[^']$

trigger.name: death_mob_desolate
trigger.match: ^(?P<mob>[\w ',]+) feels so desolate that life itself leaves \w+ wrecked form.*DEAD.*[^']$

trigger.name: death_mob_fabric
trigger.match: ^The very fabric of the world rejects .+ life is over.*DEAD.*[^']$

trigger.name: death_mob_letsout
trigger.match: ^(?P<mob>[\w ',]+) lets out .*DEAD.*[^']$

trigger.name: death_mob_slain
trigger.match: ^(?P<mob>[\w ',]+) is slain by a final .*[^']$

muclient.script:
require "themed_miniwindows"
combat_log = { window = nil, visible = true, active = false, total_exp = 0, total_gold = 0, finalize_generation = 0, }
local COMBAT_IDLE_SECONDS = 1.5
local function buffered_repaint() pcall(function() CallPlugin("abc1a0944ae4af7586ce88dc", "BufferedRepaint") end) end
local function format_number(amount) local text = tostring(math.floor(tonumber(amount) or 0)) local reversed = text:reverse():gsub("(%d%d%d)", "%1,"):reverse() return reversed:gsub("^,", "") end
local function reset_session_totals() combat_log.active = false combat_log.total_exp = 0 combat_log.total_gold = 0 end
local function begin_session_if_needed() if not combat_log.active then combat_log.active = true combat_log.total_exp = 0 combat_log.total_gold = 0 end end
local function extract_exp(line) if not line or not line:match("^You(?: don't)? receive .+ experience") then return 0 end
local total = 0 for amount in line:gmatch("(%d+)") do total = total + (tonumber(amount) or 0) end return total end
local function extract_gold(line) if not line then return 0 end
local amount = line:match("^You get ([%d,]+) gold coins from .+%.$") or line:match("^.* gives you ([%d,]+) gold coins? for .+%.$") or line:match("^Your daily blessing added ([%d,]+) gold to the corpse%.$") or line:match("^Your .* crumbles to dust, but not before giving you ([%d,]+) gold coins?%.$") or line:match("Your share is ([%d,]+) gold%.$")
if not amount then return 0 end
return tonumber((amount:gsub(",", ""))) or 0 end
local function bool_from_var(value, default) if value == nil or value == "" then return default end return value == "1" end
local function ensure_window() if combat_log.window and combat_log.window.id then return combat_log.window end
combat_log.window = ThemedTextWindow( GetPluginID() .. "_combat_log", 80, 80, 900, 500, nil, nil, true, true, true, true, true, false, false, nil, nil, GetAlphaOption("output_font_name"), GetOption("output_font_height"), 5000, 6, true )
if combat_log.visible then combat_log.window:show() end
buffered_repaint() return combat_log.window end
local function append_to_log(styles_or_text, line) local win = ensure_window()
if type(styles_or_text) == "table" and #styles_or_text > 0 then win:add_text(styles_or_text) elseif type(styles_or_text) == "string" and styles_or_text ~= "" and line == nil then win:add_text(styles_or_text) else win:add_text(line or "") end
local bottom = math.max(1, (win.textrect.num_wrapped_lines or 1) - (win.textrect.rect_lines or 1) + 1) win:set_scroll(bottom)
if combat_log.visible then win:show() end
buffered_repaint() end
function combat_finalize_if_idle(generation) if tonumber(generation) ~= combat_log.finalize_generation then return end
if not combat_log.active then return end
append_to_log( string.format( "@WCombat total: @G%s exp@W, @Y%s gold", format_number(combat_log.total_exp), format_number(combat_log.total_gold) ) ) append_to_log("@w") reset_session_totals() end
function combat_capture(name, line, wildcards, styles) begin_session_if_needed() combat_log.total_exp = combat_log.total_exp + extract_exp(line) combat_log.total_gold = combat_log.total_gold + extract_gold(line) append_to_log(styles, line) combat_log.finalize_generation = combat_log.finalize_generation + 1 DoAfterSpecial( COMBAT_IDLE_SECONDS, string.format("combat_finalize_if_idle(%d)", combat_log.finalize_generation), 12 ) end
local function combatlog_show() combat_log.visible = true ensure_window():show() buffered_repaint() ColourNote("paleturquoise", "", "Combat log window shown.") end
local function combatlog_hide() combat_log.visible = false if combat_log.window and combat_log.window.id then combat_log.window:hide() end buffered_repaint() ColourNote("paleturquoise", "", "Combat log window hidden.") end
local function combatlog_clear() local win = ensure_window() win:clear(false) reset_session_totals() combat_log.finalize_generation = combat_log.finalize_generation + 1 if combat_log.visible then win:show() end buffered_repaint() ColourNote("paleturquoise", "", "Combat log window cleared.") end
local function combatlog_help() ColourNote("lightgreen", "", "Combat log commands:") ColourNote("white", "", " combatlog show - show the combat log window") ColourNote("white", "", " combatlog hide - hide the combat log window") ColourNote("white", "", " combatlog clear - clear the combat log window") ColourNote("white", "", " combatlog help - show this help") end
function combatlog_alias(name, line, wildcards) local cmd = string.lower((wildcards[1] or "help"))
if cmd == "show" then combatlog_show() elseif cmd == "hide" then combatlog_hide() elseif cmd == "clear" then combatlog_clear() else combatlog_help() end end
function OnPluginInstall() combat_log.visible = bool_from_var(GetVariable("combatlog_visible"), true) reset_session_totals() ensure_window() end
function OnPluginEnable() combat_log.visible = bool_from_var(GetVariable("combatlog_visible"), true) reset_session_totals() ensure_window() if combat_log.visible then combat_log.window:show() else combat_log.window:hide() end buffered_repaint() end
function OnPluginDisable() if combat_log.window and combat_log.window.id then combat_log.window:hide() end end
function OnPluginClose() if combat_log.window and combat_log.window.id then combat_log.window:delete() combat_log.window = nil end end
function OnPluginSaveState() SetVariable("combatlog_visible", combat_log.visible and "1" or "0") end
